additionalProperties.description: Shell command to update this tool
Shell command to update all tools from this origin

Shell command whose stdout decides whether this origin's bulk update is needed: exit 0 with empty (or '[]'/'{}') stdout means up to date and the update is skipped; any other result runs the update as normal.

hold.description: Pinned known-tool names and/or bulk origins to skip every run until removed. An entry may be "name" or "name:major" (v1 treats both identically; see README).

repos.description: Tool/origin name -> GitHub 'owner/repo', used for the best-effort changelog digest.
